Payment required — this is the EXPECTED response for a paid tool, not an error. Calling "agent_hire_discover" costs $0.01 in USDC on Solana (paid to wwwwwDxFWRn7grgr3Esrsg5C6NvDoDHSA4gaCffccrU). To execute it, supply an x402 "exact" payment in _meta["x402/payment"] and call again, or set the reviewer entitlement (MCP_REVIEW_MODE) to run it without payment. Full machine-readable requirements are in structuredContent.accepts.

structuredContent.error: Payment required to access this tool

resource.description: Discover three.ws agents to hire for a task, ranked by task fit + live ERC-8004 on-chain reputation + real engagement. Returns a shortlist where each candidate carries its reputation evidence, capability/task-match score, and the exact USDC price agent_hire will settle. Optionally gate by a minimum reputation. Step one of the agent-to-agent commerce loop (discover → hire). Paid: $0.01 USDC.

input.description: Discover three.ws agents to hire for a task, ranked by task fit + live ERC-8004 on-chain reputation + real engagement. Returns a shortlist where each candidate carries its reputation evidence, capability/task-match score, and the exact USDC price agent_hire will settle. Optionally gate by a minimum reputation. Step one of the agent-to-agent commerce loop (discover → hire). Paid: $0.01 USDC.

task.description: Plain-language description of the work to delegate (used to rank candidates).

skill.description: Optional skill-slug filter (exact match against an agent's declared skills).

minReputation.description: Optional floor: drop agents whose on-chain ERC-8004 average is below this.

example.task: summarise the latest pump.fun graduations in 3 bullets

candidates.name: Pump Sage
candidates.evidence: ERC-8004 reputation 0.94 across 12 vouch(es) on Base · task fit 75%
